How it works

Three simple steps to make someone's day.

01
🎨

Create a board

Pick the occasion, name the person, set a deadline. Done in under a minute.

workkudo.ai
02
📬

Invite your team

Share a link or email contributors directly. No accounts needed to add a message.

workkudo.ai
03
🥳

Surprise them

Reveal the board when the moment comes. Download, share, or just send the link.

workkudo.ai

Explore WorkKudo Examples

Choose an occasion to view how teams celebrate milestones and appreciate their colleagues.

Birthday Celebration

"Wishing you the absolute best today, Sarah! Cheers to another great year."

— Michael K.
Farewell Sendoff

"Good luck at your new role, Alex! Thank you for being an amazing teammate."

— HR Team
Career Milestone

"Congrats on 5 years, David! Thank you for your dedication and leadership."

— Product Team
Healing Wishes

"Wishing you a speedy recovery, Elena! Sending you love and positive vibes."

— Engineering Dept
Happy Retirement

"Cheers to your next chapter, Robert! You will be deeply missed here."

— Management
Job Promotion

"So proud of your new Director role, Maya! Extremely well-deserved."

— Leadership Ops
Start a Board
